'''Thwim''' was a [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] security guard employed by the [[Whiphid/Legends|Whiphid]], [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Valarian/Legends|Valarian]]. He worked at the front reception area of the [[Lucky Despot]] Hotel & Casino shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Thwim was acquaintances with the [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Jizz/Legends|jizz]] musician known as [[Doikk Na'ts/Legends|Doikk Na'ts]], and ushered Doikk and the rest of his band, the [[Figrin D'an and the Modal Nodes|Modal Nodes]], into the [[Star Chamber Café]]. Thwim was present when enforcers for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] as well as [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] raided the casino disrupting the [[Wedding of Valarian and D'Wopp|wedding]] of Lady Valarian and [[D'Wopp]].
